entries.text:
Verse 9

voice

Cf. (See Scofield "Acts 9:7").

Verse 16

sins

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23").

Verse 17

when I was

i.e. probably on his first visit to Jerusalem after his conversion.

Verse 28

freedom citizenship.

was free born am a Roman born, i.e. of a father who had obtained citizenship.

Verse 29

examined him

Or, tortured him.
